Settings.EnableBleedHint: Automatically applies/upgrades bleeding effect when taking more than 5 physical damage.
Settings.EnableElementalHint: Adds automatic effects and resistance tests for acid, cold, electricity, and fire.
Settings.EnableSizeModifiersHint: Applies dice pool modifiers to attack tests based on the target metahuman's size (Body + Strength).
Settings.EnableSpeedPenaltiesHint: Applies speed-based penalties to attack and defense tests depending on distance traveled.
Settings.EnableUnopposedHint: If defense pool falls below 0, every 2 negative dice grant +1 damage bonus.

Elemental.AcidContinues: {name} continues to dissolve with acid! Received {dv} damage, next DV {nextDV}
Elemental.AcidNeutralizeDesc: Acid continues to corrode armor and deal damage. Neutralization is required.
Elemental.FireIgnited: {name} caught fire! Takes {dv} damage at the end of each round
Elemental.FireAutoIgnited: {name} automatically catches fire! Takes {dv} damage at the end of each round
Elemental.FireIntensified: The flames intensify! {name} now takes {newDV} damage (was {oldDV})
Elemental.FireContinues: {name} continues to burn! Received {dv} damage, next DV {nextDv}
Elemental.FirePartiallyExtinguished: {name} partially extinguished the fire! Damage reduced from {oldDV} to {newDV} (hits: {hits})
Elemental.FireExtinguishPrompt: {name} is burning! What do you do?
Elemental.ColdArmorCriticalGlitch: Critical glitch! Armor of {name} destroyed and caused injuries!
Elemental.ElectricityMatrixDamage: {name} takes {physical} physical damage and {matrix} matrix damage from electricity
Elemental.ElectricityInitiativeZero: {name} loses action due to electricity shock!
Elemental.AutoFailNoArmor: {name} has no armor! Effect applied in full
